title: Allahabad HC closes contempt case against UP authorities for obstructing Namaz on private property
description: The Allahabad High Court has closed proceedings under Contempt of Courts Act against the District Magistrate and Senior Superintendent of Police (SSP) of Bareilly for restraining certain persons from offering namaz at a private property in Mohammad Ganj village [Tarik Khan v State of UP & 2 Others]In January, a Division Bench of Justice Atul Sreedharan and Justice Siddharth Nandan had ruled that no permission was needed for holding a religious prayer meeting in a private property in Uttar Pr
